response.justification: Bogdan has a broad 15+ year engineering background with genuine high-scale distributed systems exposure at Dunnhumby (millions of HTTP req/s) and polyglot language coverage matching the job description. However, the resume contains no evidence of experimentation platform work, A/B testing, feature flagging, telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or growth engineering — the core competencies this Principal-level role is built around. His current Staff SE title and scope also fall short of the IC6/Principal bar, and there is no demonstrated history of owning cross-team growth strategy or building measurement systems used at enterprise scale.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with C, C++, Java, TypeScript, and more, covering the required language surface area
Proven high-throughput distributed systems work at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency async I/O
Consistent mentoring, workshop facilitation, and community teaching track record indicating cross-team influence potential
concerns: Zero explicit experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the role's core domain
No evidence of data aptitude, statistical methods, or experimental analysis; growth strategy ownership is entirely absent from the resume
Current seniority (Staff SE) and project scope are below the Principal/IC6 bar; no indication of driving multi-workstream initiatives across organizations
